info.title: ExtensionsClient
info.description: Use these APIs to create extension resources through ARM, for Kubernetes Clusters.

get.description: List all Extensions in the cluster.

parameters.name: clusterRp
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster RP - i.e. Microsoft.ContainerService, Microsoft.Kubernetes, Microsoft.HybridContainerService.

parameters.name: clusterResourceName
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster resource name - i.e. managedClusters, connectedClusters, provisionedClusters, appliances.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the kubernetes cluster.

parameters.name: clusterRp
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster RP - i.e. Microsoft.ContainerService, Microsoft.Kubernetes, Microsoft.HybridContainerService.

parameters.name: clusterResourceName
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster resource name - i.e. managedClusters, connectedClusters, provisionedClusters, appliances.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the kubernetes cluster.

parameters.name: extensionName
parameters.description: Name of the Extension.

put.description: Create a new Kubernetes Cluster Extension.

parameters.name: clusterRp
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster RP - i.e. Microsoft.ContainerService, Microsoft.Kubernetes, Microsoft.HybridContainerService.

parameters.name: clusterResourceName
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster resource name - i.e. managedClusters, connectedClusters, provisionedClusters, appliances.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the kubernetes cluster.

parameters.name: extensionName
parameters.description: Name of the Extension.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.description: Properties necessary to Create an Extension.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

patch.description: Patch an existing Kubernetes Cluster Extension.

parameters.name: clusterRp
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster RP - i.e. Microsoft.ContainerService, Microsoft.Kubernetes, Microsoft.HybridContainerService.

parameters.name: clusterResourceName
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster resource name - i.e. managedClusters, connectedClusters, provisionedClusters, appliances.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the kubernetes cluster.

parameters.name: extensionName
parameters.description: Name of the Extension.

parameters.name: patchExtension
parameters.description: Properties to Patch in an existing Extension.

202.description: The request has been accepted for processing, but processing has not yet completed.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

delete.description: Delete a Kubernetes Cluster Extension. This will cause the Agent to Uninstall the extension from the cluster.

parameters.name: clusterRp
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster RP - i.e. Microsoft.ContainerService, Microsoft.Kubernetes, Microsoft.HybridContainerService.

parameters.name: clusterResourceName
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster resource name - i.e. managedClusters, connectedClusters, provisionedClusters, appliances.

parameters.name: clusterName
parameters.description: The name of the kubernetes cluster.

parameters.name: extensionName
parameters.description: Name of the Extension.

parameters.name: forceDelete
parameters.description: Delete the extension resource in Azure - not the normal asynchronous delete.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: clusterRp
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster RP - i.e. Microsoft.ContainerService, Microsoft.Kubernetes, Microsoft.HybridContainerService.

parameters.name: clusterResourceName
parameters.description: The Kubernetes cluster resource name - i.e. managedClusters, connectedClusters, provisionedClusters, appliances.

parameters.description: Name of the Extension.

values.name: SystemAssigned
values.description: SystemAssigned identity

values.name: UserAssigned
values.description: UserAssigned identity

values.name: Workload
values.description: Workload identity

AccessDetail.description: Metadata about the access details of the managing entity of the extension

entity.description: The entity to which the access details apply

allowedActions.description: The list of allowed actions for the entity

AdditionalDetails.description: Additional details provided by the publisher of the extension.

AutoUpgradeMode.description:
The upgrade mode for auto upgrade.
The default is "compatible".

values.name: none
values.description: The extension will not be automatically upgraded.

values.name: patch
values.description: The extension will be automatically upgraded to the latest patch version within the minor version.

values.name: compatible
values.description: The extension will be automatically upgraded to compatible versions as determined by the user.

CreatedByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

values.name: User
values.description: Created through an interactive sign-in by a person.

values.name: Application
values.description: Created by an app registration or service principal acting as a client.

values.name: ManagedIdentity
values.description: Created via an Azure managed identity (system- or user-assigned).

values.name: Key
values.description: Created using a key-based credential flow supported by some services.

managedBy.description: The fully qualified resource ID of the resource that manages this resource. Indicates if this resource is managed by another Azure resource. If this is present, complete mode deployment will not delete the resource if it is removed from the template since it is managed by another resource.

extensionType.description: Type of the Extension, of which this resource is an instance of.  It must be one of the Extension Types registered with Microsoft.KubernetesConfiguration by the Extension publisher.

autoUpgradeMinorVersion.description: Flag to note if this extension participates in auto upgrade of minor version, or not.

releaseTrain.description: ReleaseTrain this extension participates in for auto-upgrade (e.g. Stable, Preview, etc.) - only if autoUpgradeMinorVersion is 'true'.

version.description: User-specified version of the extension for this extension to 'pin'. To use 'version', autoUpgradeMinorVersion must be 'false'.

scope.description: Scope at which the extension is installed.

configurationSettings.description: Configuration settings, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

configurationProtectedSettings.description: Configuration settings that are sensitive, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

currentVersion.description: Currently installed version of the extension.

provisioningState.description: Status of installation of this extension.

errorInfo.description: Error information from the Agent - e.g. errors during installation.

aksAssignedIdentity.description: Identity of the Extension resource in an AKS cluster

isSystemExtension.description: Flag to note if this extension is a system extension

autoUpgradeMode.description:
The upgrade mode for auto upgrade.
The default is "compatible".

values.name: none
values.description: The extension will not be automatically upgraded.

values.name: patch
values.description: The extension will be automatically upgraded to the latest patch version within the minor version.

values.name: compatible
values.description: The extension will be automatically upgraded to compatible versions as determined by the user.

additionalDetails.description: Additional details provided by the publisher of the extension.

extensionState.description: State of the extension on the cluster.

ExtensionPropertiesAksAssignedIdentity.description: Identity of the Extension resource in an AKS cluster

principalId.description: The principal ID of resource identity.

objectId.description: The object ID of resource identity.

clientId.description: The client ID of resource identity.

resourceId.description: The ID of the resource identity.

code.description: Status code provided by the Extension

displayStatus.description: Short description of status of the extension.

values.name: Error
values.description: Indicates an error status from the extension.

values.name: Warning
values.description: Indicates a warning status from the extension.

values.name: Information
values.description: Indicates an informational status from the extension.

message.description: Detailed message of the status from the Extension.

time.description: DateLiteral (per ISO8601) noting the time of installation status.

ExtensionsList.description: Result of the request to list Extensions.  It contains a list of Extension objects and a URL link to get the next set of results.

value.description: The Extension items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

values.name: Error
values.description: Indicates an error status from the extension.

values.name: Warning
values.description: Indicates a warning status from the extension.

values.name: Information
values.description: Indicates an informational status from the extension.

ManagementDetails.description: Metadata about the managing entity of the extension and the permitted operations.

category.description: The category of the managing entity

accessDetails.description: The list of access details of the managing entity

OperationStatusResult.description: The current status of an async operation.

id.description: Fully qualified ID for the async operation.

error.description: If present, details of the operation error.

properties.description: Updatable properties of an Extension Patch Request

PatchExtensionProperties.description: Updatable properties of an Extension Patch Request

autoUpgradeMinorVersion.description: Flag to note if this extension participates in auto upgrade of minor version, or not.

autoUpgradeMode.description:
The upgrade mode for auto upgrade.
The default is "compatible".

values.name: none
values.description: The extension will not be automatically upgraded.

values.name: patch
values.description: The extension will be automatically upgraded to the latest patch version within the minor version.

values.name: compatible
values.description: The extension will be automatically upgraded to compatible versions as determined by the user.

releaseTrain.description: ReleaseTrain this extension participates in for auto-upgrade (e.g. Stable, Preview, etc.) - only if autoUpgradeMinorVersion is 'true'.

version.description: Version of the extension for this extension, if it is 'pinned' to a specific version. autoUpgradeMinorVersion must be 'false'.

configurationSettings.description: Configuration settings, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

configurationProtectedSettings.description: Configuration settings that are sensitive, as name-value pairs for configuring this extension.

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: Resource has been created.

values.name: Failed
values.description: Resource creation failed.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: Resource creation was canceled.

values.name: Creating
values.description: Resource is being created.

values.name: Updating
values.description: Resource is being updated.

values.name: Deleting
values.description: Resource is being deleted.

Scope.description: Scope of the extension. It can be either Cluster or Namespace; but not both.

cluster.description: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Cluster

namespace.description: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Namespace

ScopeCluster.description: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Cluster

releaseNamespace.description: Namespace where the extension Release must be placed, for a Cluster scoped extension.  If this namespace does not exist, it will be created

ScopeNamespace.description: Specifies that the scope of the extension is Namespace

targetNamespace.description: Namespace where the extension will be created for an Namespace scoped extension.  If this namespace does not exist, it will be created
